key_developments.headline: Nato 'cannot confirm' Iran behind attack on UK-US base after Iranian denial
key_developments.detail: Nato Secretary General Mark Rutte has said the military alliance "cannot confirm" Israel's claim that missiles allegedly targeting the UK - US base on Diego Garcia last week were fired by Iran . key_developments.detail: While interacting with reporters at Florida's Palm Beach on Monday, US President Donald Trump said that Washington and Tehran "have major points of agreement". "We have major point of agreement; I would say almost all points of agreement," Trump told reporters on Iran.
key_developments.fullAnalysis: While interacting with reporters at Florida's Palm Beach on Monday, US President Donald Trump said that Washington and Tehran "have major points of agreement". "We have major point of agreement; I would say almost all points of agreement," Trump told reporters on Iran.

key_developments.headline: Trump suggests price of oil will 'drop like a rock' if a deal with Iran is made
key_developments.detail: US President Donald Trump claimed to reporters that the price of oil will "drop like a rock" if the United States makes a deal with Iran to end the war. key_developments.headline: Israel's Mossad promised it could ignite regime change in Iran, says report
key_developments.detail: Israel ’s intelligence agency Mossad had a plan to ignite public protests that would lead to the collapse of Iran ’s government, the New York Times has reported . terminology_explained.simple_explanation: Iran's elite Revolutionary Guard — controls missiles and drones.
Narrow waterway — 20% of world oil passes through it.

what_to_watch_next: Monitor live feeds for breaking developments.

india_impact.headline: India Monitors Gulf Conflict
india_impact.detail: India's energy security tied to Gulf stability.
india_impact.full_detail: India imports 85% of crude oil from Gulf. Strait of Hormuz disruption would immediately impact supply.

indiaSummary: India continues to monitor the US-Israel-Iran conflict closely given its significant dependence on Gulf energy imports and the large Indian diaspora. Oil price volatility directly impacts petrol prices for Indian consumers.
